reviews.comment:

Spacious and comfortable place, but they don't share Wi-Fi with customers, and the bathrooms lack hygiene.

reviews.comment:
Los baños son inmundos.  Los precios caros. A veces no hay nafta. El servicio mediocre.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are filthy. The prices are high. Sometimes there's no gas. The service is mediocre.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRN0phb2d3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Paso diez veces al año desde hace 20, muchas moscas, mala higiene, no merece ser ACA, llamado de atencion

(Translated by Google)
I've been passing by ten times a year for the last 20 years; lots of flies, poor hygiene, it doesn't deserve to be an ACA (Area of ​​Attention to the Environment), a warning.
